✶ . ࣪ ׅ high school au' 🪐

☆ “Then she asked if I loved her. Can you believe that?”☆

— you’re the school charmer’s best friend.

_______________________________________

Being Osamu Dazai’s closest friend was rough, constantly knowing half the population of your school was entranced by him. You didn’t see the hype. If anything, he was an annoying piece of shit that ranted on and on… well, your piece of shit. :3

_______________________________________

well well well I have hit 1.3k messages on my other high school au Dazai!!! the crowd cheers and rejoices I know I know I’m just so super kewl… heh…

anyways I really hope this bot does as well was the other one since I really locked in on the first message fucking Shakespeare possessed me at 2am, trust !! (It will probably sound like shit when I reread it tomorrow morning.. 🥀)

Anyways please enjoy my bot and don’t forget to like and subscribe and hit that bell (please leave a review :D) !!
